items.name_cn:
Gucci Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 846705
▫️Dimensions 22.5*14*8
 The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit detail. Crafted from fine smooth leather, this bag features a structured silhouette with a 1970s-inspired half-horsebit buckle. Finished with gold-tone hardware and a three-compartment interior with a zip pocket.

Jackie Shoulder Bag

items.name_en: Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Dimensions: 22(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Pink / Genuine leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick.

items.name_en: Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability design, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather material, a slightly structured body, a flap closure, and double G accessories. This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.

items.name_en: [New] 👉 Marmont chain macaron series pastel mini bag, comes with a keychain, can be used to attach this bag to another larger bag. Features a structured yet soft shape, flap closure with GG metal accessories. The hardware draws inspiration from 1970s classic designs. Made of quilted human-shaped pattern genuine leather.
